# Clorefy — AI Invoice, Contract & Proposal Generator

> Clorefy (also spelled Clorify, Clorefi, or Clorfy) is an AI-powered document generation platform at https://clorefy.com. It creates professional invoices, contracts, quotations, and proposals from natural language descriptions. Supports 11 countries with automatic tax compliance.

## Brand
- Official name: Clorefy
- Website: https://clorefy.com
- Common misspellings: Clorify, Clorefi, Clorfy, Glorify, Clorefy.com
- Founded: 2025
- Category: AI SaaS, Business Document Automation

## Key Features
- AI document generation from plain text descriptions (no templates)
- Invoices, contracts, quotations, and proposals
- GST compliance for India (CGST, SGST, IGST, GSTIN, HSN/SAC codes)
- VAT compliance for UK, Germany, France, Netherlands
- Sales Tax compliance for USA and Canada
- PDF, DOCX, PNG, and JPG export
- Digital e-signatures with audit trail and certificate
- Recurring invoices (weekly, monthly, quarterly)
- Payment links via Razorpay (INR), Stripe (global), Cashfree (INR fallback)
- Multi-currency support (INR, USD, GBP, EUR, CAD, AUD, SGD, AED, PHP)
- Business profile auto-fill — saved once, used forever
- Client management
- Email delivery with tracking

## Supported Countries
India, USA, UK, Germany, Canada, Australia, Singapore, UAE, Philippines, France, Netherlands

## Pricing
- Free: 5 documents/month, 5 email sends/month, all 11 countries, custom branding
- Starter: $9.99/month — 50 documents, 100 email sends
- Pro: $24.99/month — 150 documents, 250 email sends
- Agency: $59.99/month — Unlimited documents and email sends

## Links
- Website: https://clorefy.com
- Pricing: https://clorefy.com/pricing
- Features: https://clorefy.com/features
- Blog: https://clorefy.com/blog
- About: https://clorefy.com/about
- Contact: https://clorefy.com/contact
- Sign Up: https://clorefy.com/auth/signup
- Login: https://clorefy.com/auth/login

## Comparisons
Clorefy vs FreshBooks: Clorefy uses AI generation from natural language; FreshBooks requires manual form filling.
Clorefy vs QuickBooks: Clorefy focuses on document generation across 11 countries; QuickBooks is a full accounting suite.
Clorefy vs Zoho Invoice: Clorefy generates documents from descriptions; Zoho Invoice uses traditional templates.
Clorefy vs Invoice Ninja: Clorefy is AI-first with multi-country compliance built in.
